message:
🌱 Add backstage: [Plugin] Prometheus mission (#908)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "backstage-714-plugin-prometheus",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "backstage: [Plugin] Prometheus",
+    "description": "A Prometheus plugin for Backstage that allows developers to view the health and performance of their services by embedding Prometheus queries and graphs directly into the Backstage service catalog. Requested by 44+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current Backstage setup",
+        "description": "Verify your Backstage installation is running:\n```bash\n# If running via Docker:\ndocker ps | grep backstage\n\n# If deployed on Kubernetes:\nkubectl get pods -n backstage\n```\nThis plugin requires a running Backstage instance and a Prometheus server accessible from the Backstage backend."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Install the Prometheus plugin",
+        "description": "Add the Prometheus plugin to your Backstage app. Several community-maintained Prometheus plugins are available:\n\n1. **@roadiehq/backstage-plugin-prometheus** - Provides Prometheus graphs and alerts in the Backstage UI\n2. Install via your Backstage app's packages:\n```bash\ncd packages/app\nyarn add @roadiehq/backstage-plugin-prometheus\n```\nSee the Backstage Plugin Marketplace for the latest available Prometheus plugins."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Configure Prometheus integration",
+        "description": "Add the Prometheus proxy configuration to your `app-config.yaml`:\n```yaml\nproxy:\n  '/prometheus/api':\n    target: http://prometheus-server:9090/api/v1/\n    changeOrigin: true\n```\nThen annotate your catalog entities to link them to Prometheus:\n```yaml\napiVersion: backstage.io/v1alpha1\nkind: Component\nmetadata:\n  annotations:\n    prometheus.io/rule: 'up{job=\"my-service\"}'\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the Prometheus plugin works",
+        "description": "Open Backstage and navigate to a service entity that has Prometheus annotations:\n1. Check that the Prometheus tab or card appears on the entity page\n2. Verify that Prometheus metrics and graphs are displayed correctly\n3. Confirm that alerts from Prometheus are visible if configured"
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Community-maintained Prometheus plugins are available for Backstage that embed Prometheus queries, graphs, and alerts directly into the service catalog entity pages. Install via the Backstage Plugin Marketplace, configure the Prometheus proxy in app-config.yaml, and annotate catalog entities with Prometheus queries.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "proxy:\n  '/prometheus/api':\n    target: http://prometheus-server:9090/api/v1/\n    changeOrigin: true"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "backstage",
+      "incubating",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "backstage"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Service"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/backstage/backstage/issues/714",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/backstage/backstage"
+    },
+    "reactions": 44,
+    "comments": 16,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "docker"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Backstage instance (via Docker, npx @backstage/create-app, or Kubernetes) and a Prometheus server."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:20:49.478Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
